message:
test(proptest): add 22 property tests for ingest coverage gaps

Expand proptest_ingest from 40 to 62 tests (IN-41 through IN-62).

New coverage: IngestTelemetrySnapshot/OverflowPolicy/StreamChannelConfig/
StreamIngesterTelemetrySnapshot serde roundtrips, ShellState is_at_prompt/
is_command_running/is_idle properties, Osc133State marker processing
transitions and counter incrementing, OutputCache dedup/different-content/
stats/LRU-eviction behavior, AltScreenChange detection (DECSET 1049 enter/
exit/combined), StreamIngester monotonic seq and overflow GAP emission,
StreamChannel capacity enforcement and DropOldest eviction, DiscoveryDiff
change_count consistency, PanePriorityOverride serde, ObservationDecision
Ignored reason storage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
